About the Department

MENU

Our mission is to educate professionals who possess comprehensive knowledge of the theoretical and practical dimensions of international trade; who have advanced digital and analytical competencies; who effectively use at least one foreign language; who demonstrate intercultural communication proficiency; who uphold ethical principles and social responsibility; and who are capable of strategic thinking and actively contributing to economic and commercial development by engaging effectively in the global business environment.
